quote: Those who achieve great things, those who lead, create and inspire do not depend on calm seas — they learn to steer even in the storm. When they face loss or rejection they do not crumble, they adjust their sails. When they encounter betrayal or disappointment, they do not lash out — they learn, grow, and they move forward with greater strength.

hero.name: Eugene
hero.bio:
We learn to steer even in the storm.
CEO & Founder at For You Commerce. Building the future of feed-based commerce.

aboutTeaser.body: Self-taught Full-Stack Engineer from Accra, Ghana with a BA in Education, Psychology and Information Studies. I design, build, and ship complete products solo — leveraging AI to move at the speed of a team.
aboutTeaser.bodySecondary: From social commerce platforms to AI participation assistants to civic tech portals, I take ideas from zero to production. My mission: making African developers legible to global capital and helping them scale products internationally.
aboutTeaser.quote: Those who achieve great things do not depend on calm seas — they learn to steer even in the storm.

experiences.title: Founder, CEO & Full-Stack Engineer
description: Founded and built a social commerce platform making commerce in the era of feeds trustworthy, scam-free, and seamless.
Designed and developed the full-stack application from scratch using Next.js, Node.js, and PostgreSQL, handling real-time features and payment processing.
Leading product strategy, engineering, and growth as a solo founder shipping production-grade software.

experiences.title: Founder & Builder
description: Building infrastructure for African SaaS founders and developers to scale their products internationally.
Creating tools and resources that make African developers legible to global capital.
Developing a platform ecosystem to support the growing African SaaS landscape.

experiences.title: Data Mining Specialist
description: Specialized in AI training data mining, preparing and curating high-quality datasets for machine learning models.
Applied rigorous data analysis and quality assurance processes to ensure training data integrity.
Contributed to the development pipeline for AI systems requiring structured, reliable input data.

experiences.title: Independent Builder
description: Self-taught development through YouTube, W3Schools, and Udemy — then applied knowledge to ship real-world products.
Built and shipped multiple projects including Audience (AI participation assistant), Nwoma (academic tool), Betify (MyHuzl), and Nita Stop The Bill.
Mastered building with AI, using modern tools to architect, build, and deploy full-stack applications at startup speed.

education.details: Majored in Education. Developed strong analytical, research, and communication skills that inform a thoughtful, user-first approach to software engineering and product design.

Built expertise in full-stack development through rigorous self-study and shipping real-world products. Mastered building with AI. Technologies include React, Next.js, TypeScript, Node.js, Python, and PostgreSQL.

philosophy.title: Intentional Design
philosophy.content: Every interface decision should solve a real problem. I approach design with the same rigor as engineering — data-informed, user-tested, and purpose-driven.

philosophy.title: Scalable Architecture
philosophy.content: I build systems designed for growth — clean abstractions, robust APIs, and maintainable codebases that stand the test of time and scale.

philosophy.title: Continuous Improvement
philosophy.content: Software is never finished. I believe in iterative refinement driven by performance metrics, user feedback, and an unwavering commitment to quality.
